context: Agent must restructure a flat docs directory of 15 files into a logical hierarchy and produce a documentation index README.md.

checklist.name: files_grouped_logically
checklist.description: Installation, API, and deployment files each grouped into their own subdirectory.

checklist.name: max_three_levels
checklist.description: No path exceeds docs/subdir/file.md depth (max 3 levels including docs/).

checklist.name: all_subjects_preserved
checklist.description: Every original subject (installation, authentication, API, deployment, development setup, testing, architecture, FAQ, contributing) has a home in the new structure.

checklist.name: readme_exists
checklist.description: docs/README.md is present with a code-fenced directory tree and navigation sections with relative links.

checklist.name: user_journey_navigation
checklist.description: Navigation follows logical user journey order: Getting Started, Guides, Reference, Contributing (or similar progressive structure).

checklist.name: kebab_case
checklist.description: All paths use kebab-case filenames. No underscores or camelCase.

checklist.name: code_fences_tagged
checklist.description: Directory tree code block has a language tag (text or markdown). Any command examples use bash.
